title: PAI: The Life OS for AI-Powered Development
summary: PAI (Personal AI Infrastructure) is a Life OS built on Claude Code that provides persistent memory, custom skills, and structured workflows to help developers maintain context across AI sessions. It includes features like a Pulse dashboard and a seven-phase algorithm for observe, think, plan, build, execute, verify, and learn workflows.
writeup: The video covers PAI (Personal AI Infrastructure), a Life OS built on Claude Code that aims to keep context intact across AI sessions through persistent memory, custom skills, and structured workflows. It matters because losing context between sessions is a recurring friction point in AI-assisted development. Concrete takeaways: PAI includes a Pulse dashboard and a seven-phase algorithm covering observe, think, plan, build, execute, verify, and learn.
